meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve Stuck App Building
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome the 'stuck with basic apps' plateau. An intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for freelancers.
content.answer_block: Stop building one-off sites that stop paying when you stop coding. By shifting to micro-SaaS products, you leverage your existing dev skills to build automated, recurring revenue streams. Use Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code to automate the heavy lifting, turning your freelance bottleneck into a scalable passive income machine.
content.intro:
The freelance treadmill is a relentless grind. You wake up, chase a client, build a basic CRUD app, collect the check, and start from zero the next day. You're trapped in a cycle of trading hours for dollars, watching your potential for exponential growth wither under the weight of constant maintenance and project churn.

But the architectural shift you need isn't more hours—it's leverage. By pivoting from bespoke client work to modular, AI-assisted micro-SaaS, you reclaim your autonomy. This guide blueprints exactly how to use high-velocity tools to build, deploy, and scale passive assets that work while you sleep, finally breaking the 'stuck' cycle.

steps.title: Identify High-Margin Niche Micro-Tools
steps.description: Analyze your past client projects to find recurring manual tasks. We are building a focused utility, not a complex platform.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my previous freelance project history and suggest 3 high-demand, low-maintenance micro-SaaS ideas that solve a specific B2B pain point.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze my current project portfolio and output a JSON list of top 3 micro-SaaS opportunities'

steps.title: Rapid Scaffold with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate architecture, ensuring you have a production-ready foundation without writing the initial setup code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js 15, Tailwind, and Supabase boilerplate with Stripe integration for a subscription-based SaaS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the project structure based on the Antigravity boilerplate output'

steps.title: Automate Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to implement the core business logic, reducing coding time by 70% using agentic context awareness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core logic for a user-facing dashboard that fetches real-time data from the Supabase API and displays it in a responsive table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement the dashboard logic using the existing Supabase client'

steps.title: Integration of Recurring Revenue
steps.description: Set up Stripe Webhooks to handle subscription states, ensuring your app handles payments without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure serverless function that handles Stripe Webhooks to provision user access upon successful payment confirmation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create the stripe-webhook.ts handler to update user subscription status in Supabase'

steps.title: Deployment and Observability
steps.description: Ship to production and set up automated logging to ensure the system remains stable without constant oversight.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Vercel deployment settings and integrate Sentry for automated error tracking and performance monitoring.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure Vercel and Sentry integration for the current project'

pro_tips: Prioritize 'boring' problems over 'innovative' ones; business owners pay for reliability, not novelty.
Ship the MVP in under 48 hours; if it takes longer, you are over-engineering the feature set.
Use Supabase RLS (Row Level Security) as your primary security layer to avoid building custom auth logic.
Set up automated email sequences via Postmark immediately after user signup to boost retention without manual outreach.
Focus on SEO-driven landing pages; let the content work for you while the software runs in the background.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on distribution. Reach out to the communities where your target users hang out, share your tool, and iterate based on the first 10 paying customers.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the blueprint to stop trading time and start building wealth. Don't let another month of freelance grind pass you by while your ideas sit in a folder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
